It's a good game has potential with the correct updates needs autopilot and it uses to much GB of ram for medium to high graphic s setting, also you're plane shows as a dark shadow no livery but AI plane's show as livery lastly global needs a lot of work and frame rates fix all that and I will give 5 star honestly has potential to be one of the best flight sims on play store.

I write a 1 star because, I'm playing on a Samsung. And basically, everytime I log in the game, it goes to this black screen and exits me out the game. It keeps doing this over and over again. But, your game is fine. When I can play it. Sometimes, the game crashes and sometimes it doesn't. I need you as a developer to fix this issue for Samsung users. Game is alright when in the air but the rest is just trash. Alot of the times when you start your game, you would most likely spawn mid-way through the ground and would also say that im in the air. The radio is also bad as it just keeps saying one thing over and over.

This game is good well because it has an interactive cockpit than to other simulation games, but every time I tap the watch ad, the ad doesn't work. Even when I start flying, it is very laggy unless being on the ground.

Aircraft will not push back when using tilt mode instead of the joystick. For a FS fanatic this game is great, wish there could be alittle more as far as maps or planning. Would love to see missions or pre-planned routes with atc/emergencys etc.. in one of these flight sim apps. Maybe these developers can make that happen. Would give it 5 stars if the pushback worked in tilt mode and will edit my review if it gets fixed. I'll call google and yellow them to add a 6th star if they can add on too

The game is actually a good game just that I don't always have any destination where am going to and not even a take off clearance is giving to me and even when I open the location, it would only be showing me just the distance (km) to the airport that my plane is. In my experience there are alott off potential the graphics are very nice and the game give you the true experience off flighing a real plane but there are to many glitches in the game inner part off the plane jumps around movement to fast and glitches in the game it self where it get stuck on a main screen while flighing and throw game out

star_3.text: Great physics, though it's not quite a simulator because you cannot manually change most of the aircraft's systems. The landing gear lever does not always work and the camera does not always respond to swipes.

It's a good game, with realistic airplanes and beautiful airports to fly to. All the aircraft can be bought with in game xp, unlike other simulators that require in app purchases to buy better aircraft. However, the flight controls do need to be reworked as they are almost impossible to fly with and ruins the experience of this otherwise good game.

This is good, I like it, but definitely room for improvement. Graphics need a bit of work, and would be better if you could read whats on the buttons/controls. Where is the landing tutorial? How do you put down the landing gear? Overall I really like this, I just wish there was more to it. More gadgets, controls, and landing tutorial and I'll give it 5☆☆☆☆☆. Also I see there is a paid version for a more immersive simulation. But the latest feedback to too negative for me to pay money...

This flight simulator has gone a long way since I started it. It might even be able to compete with infinite flight soon. Problem is, I have a brand new Samsung galaxy A13, high functionality, and it still lags really strongly. It can get to the point where the game is unplayable. Also, could you add smaller aircraft like the twin otter and cirrus SR21? Thank you.
I wish that the AI traffic can take off and land and also more airlines and also a little bit more airplanes. but his game is so really good.

Game has potential. If bugs are fixed game will be awesome. First off it keeps on crashing. Second of all if you drop the plane from the sky it doesn't explode. Third the airport graphics are not up to par. Fourth the controls need improvement. But the time i managed to fly the plane without crashing (A320) it was good so it has potential to be a really nice realistic simulator

The cockpit interaction is awesome. The graphics are really good. The sound is also excellent. but the game is stuck in between, the airport runway is not visible in the cockpit map so we couldn't land the flight at the very first try and once we lost the landing and if we try to land again at the same airport runway, the airport graphics will be not the same at the second try. there will be no airport.

good but needs some additional improvements. 1. when you move your camera screen it moves so slow 2. tilted gears we need THEM!! 3. Gear Rolling 4. Gear suspension, doesn't just stick to the ground 5. more aircrafts it has been the same aircraft for a year now. FYI: I acknowledge this is made in Unity

Game play/ controls are iffy take off push back not working auto pilot controls iffy can't even get to the runway the plane won't even move even after releasing the brakes I uninstall this game because of this I'd even paid for some planes thought I'd give it another chance reinstalled it only not to get the planes I'd paid for and everything was even worse than before. I wouldn't waist time downloading it again but that's upto the individual don't take my word for it try it you'll find out.

All good and all but it is very bad for people playing on mid-range or lower end phones as it will take your phone to it's limits and I only caps at 30 fps. This issue WONT be found on high end, top notch spec phone. Other than that it's very good to see Mobile flight sims start adding interactive cockpits.

I have a few issues, biggest one is dispite staying in the green during landing challenge (in both air speed and rate of decent)... always says very bad landing. So i have no chance to advance. I emailed them but never received a reply. Could be awesome!!!!!

A good game. You can download and play with only 2 airplane. Boeing B737 and Airbus A320 and no physics. Like i can fly through buildings and in the cockpit only gear handle & Engine switch works. No auto pilots, no trim. And add reverse thrusts, spoilers, landing lights and beacon light switch. thank you.

The controls are poor. If you guys add missions it would be nice. When i enable tilt option the aircraft is bouncing in the air its too much sensivitiy and some times the ground becomes black and i can't see the runway. There is so many things to upgrade. I hope you guys solve these things on next update. Rest of the game i loved it.

Downloaded and played this game.. but soon lost interest.. there is a lot to do on this one. Controls are not very user freindly, finding in cabin levers and switches are a task.. some textual stickers may help. STALLING IS MAJOR ISSUE. Graphics e looks good. If worked around, this could be an interesting game.

"ok, it's not bad for starters. The cockpit control is spot on, and everything looks really good. But there is no flight plan or logistics to fly along to, otherwise, we are just flying blind looking for places to land. Not bad, but needs more structure into flight plans and etc."

The game lags a bit, needs to be improved, and make everything free, let the paying be optional, let us get the North American pack from XP too and add more liveries and planes too. This is because I have a Youtube channel of FS Advanced, and I want to show everything this game has. Add a Boeing 787-10 Dreamliner and Boeing 777X

The game is extremely good.I love it.It has 3D graphics,real life liveries.But there is one problem,landing is impossible.When I apply flaps and switch on spoiler,it starts descending very fast and sometimes,it stalls.If you fix this problem,then I would give you 5 stars.By the way,it is truly a realistic flight simulator game.

This simulator has big potential. However, I have several suggestions for players to have a better experience. Admin can consider to change the control layout to make it more organised and professional. Admin can also try to add ATC feature where we as player interact with ATC for requests. Moreover, having mission (specific missions) or free flight section might be a great idea to make this game relevant. I can't say much about graphics. It is decent and I hope to improve from time to time.

I swear the game has a lot of potential,it has good graphics and a bunch of planes,the big issue this game has is bugs,every time I change the camera it's locked and I can't move it, sometimes when I click nothing happens, please fix them.

Very realistic plane's and controls. Things I don't like are I can't swipe my screen around so I can see different angles have to keep swiping the screen until it moves a little. I don't know where I am going seem to just fly anywhere. Not much training. Take off is too quick.

star_4.text: Hi! What a cool game! Great quality! But I noticed something about the A350-900; Emirates also has an A350-900. Could you please add it? Thanks!

It's an amazing game! Nice graphics, great controls but it's a bit annoying you have to pay for ALL the airport's. Mabey add the arrows for the flight planned because I don't know what runway I have to take off. And mabey remove a couple of adds. And it maybe a good idea to add a time to departure and how much fuel you have left etc (this only counts for flight planner) But in conclusion it's a GREAT game, I absolutely love it thank you!

Very realistic flight sim. but currently I can't land the aircraft after a journey because I can't see the runway and the automatic approach button is not working. The only useful things I get here is when am taking off from their airport and in the short landing challenges. Otherwise a full trip with take off and landing is still not possible and I would like you to fix this. Meanwhile, I want to say the sound of the airliners is very realistic in this game as well.
I think the a380 needs rework the gear and add the colorful design like fly better of a380
its my best flight sim and i really liked it, somehow it lags a bit

All the unity flight simulators are the worst. But this unity flight simulator is better. But i will give you 4 stars because the A320 nose cone looks so bad. Only square holograms. But nice flight sim.

good game but a few issues I have especially with the settings when you have to leave the game and change them instead of going to the option menu. another issue I have is (maybe it's my phone) the game lags a lot like it will stop for 2-6 seconds and sometimes 10-19 seconds. (@brodenconway you have to go to the cockpit camera and select the landing gear switch)

On my ipad, it doesn't work but on my mums phone, it's perfect. The graphics are top tier and the simulation is nothing short of great. I'm always eager to play as I wanted to grow up as a pilot. The tutorial though, isn't that helpful, maybe help with landing but yeah. Also I love the wide variety of planes and it's not always 'you need to pay for these' alot like infinite flight😒 So yeah, epic game

The game is good but graphics need to be bit advanced. Like the plane should fly through the clouds. I want the right view of the wing but only left view of the wing is there. Overall the game is good with realistic simulations, better graphics, good quality sound but it needs some more development

this is the best flight simulator you can get for free!!. but a few complaints; The camera is a bit slow & buggy, the engine controls are not sensitive enough (they won't start on the first press).But other than that it's super realistic, they should make a Vr version.

Everything is fine, the graphics, the graphics... This is a great game. It has great features, sounds, realisms included in it. But the reason that I am withdrawing 1 star is that this game needs a multiplayer. Please include a multiplayer as soon as possible.

really good but just some few bugs

The simulator is great Yes, this game is good and realistic. And also free. But the problem is, replay mode. Like, it only replays 5-10 seconds of what happened instead of the entire scenario. You should fix it and have replay modes like xplane.
Thanks for updating the game fastly

Good game I mean best game ever but I suggest you to please add gear tilt and make a like a startup at the runway and also make it so you could choose which runway you want to approach and make it a little easier to land I got 5-6 perfect landing and 15-12 good landings but make it a little easier

The controls are not good enough, and pls add some graphics of that the boarding gate is attaching and the passengers are boarding, etc. Its a nice game but you must add some more realistic features. Pls add this and more in your next update. Thank you.

This game is the best flight simulator after Infinite flight this game is better than aerofly that greedy game.Other thing that is annoying is when I spawn a plane landing on the gate or mid flight it stalls to the ground I tried it hundreds of times please fix this I played this Game before on my old phone long time ago And I loved it.

star_5.text: I love this game compared to RFS & Infinite Flight. I love how you can use XP to buy the planes & have the option to buy with money. Way better than having to use pro just to use other planes for one month. My favorite plane to use is the A380. I only have 2 problems 1) To be completely honest I make videos using the replays but the ground once your in the air starts glitching taking the realism out. 2) The other planes on the runway are amazing, but I really wish they could actually take off.

this is one of the best mobile flight sim after turboprop flight simulator but jesus I'm glad there's a flight simulator not like infinite flight but I RECOMMEND THIS But I know it crashes but it's an good game, the planes, the airports and stuff like that

This game is VERY good, all avgeeks SHOULD have this game! I will play this ofc! its thebest its so good like any other game its has its flaw but plaese add a Airtstair and AI PASSENGER and a baggage loder yea that stuff anyway its good

This game is very good. The graphics are stunning. Planes are very realistic. It feels like we are piloting an actual plane. It is like a real flight experience. But I would recommend to add the Concorde to the game. Overall the game is really nice
Amazing free game for mobile. The ui is kind of cluttered and it's not the "beautiful" but it's really fun for your free time. Really hopes this game makes it big.

It's a decent flight simulator, I really enjoyed the controls and game mechanics and graphics considering it is a free simulation game. But there's still some room for improvements. Overall it is a great game I'll surely buy some in game purchases as long as it's affordable

It's nice, I've redawnloaded the game, and I've was like one the first start, I've lost the aircraft that I had, and all the XP with all the acheavments... ...also the scenery is broken in pieces so I can see moon instead of solid ground... ...but the game is good,it could be better, so please fix that because I like your game. I always look for Flight Plan feature in upcoming updates. But It is not included here yet. We are getting bored. If I am right nobody can fly using flight plan feature which is a must having feature in every popular android flight sims. You have great locations , but that X plane mobile gives access to plan the routes . And we want the same here. I hope you will pay your attention.

good game, better than IFS and X Plane combined. Just add 757, 767, a300, a310, 747-100, 747-8i and cargo versions of these planes (if they have a cargo version). That's all, I hope this game continues to be free, good luck devs.

Great flight simulator the planes are great sometimes the game takes a while to load the map and in probably 3 seconds it's ready. I enjoy playing this and for those who leave 1 star Don't know what they are missing out. Overall great game unity did a fantastic job and the air traffic control is just perfect.

This game is absolutely amazing. if only there was a Queen B747, it would have been better. I am one of the o.gs of this game, even before it was reviewed by Swiss001 and I find this game easy and amazing. if you add a B747 and make it longer, with a less costly price, I will surely buy it.
